Notice Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Laralie Paras, Esq., Seven Hills LLP, 415-926-7247, for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.
Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 Court reporter,

Plaintiff's counsel appears to confirm that the submitted order and judgment will be signed.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS' Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
